string.name: reason_bluetooth_access
string.value: 需要蓝牙权限以连接蓝牙设备

string.name: reason_bluetooth_discover
string.value: 需要蓝牙权限以发现蓝牙设备

string.name: reason_location_access
string.value: 需要定位权限以获取GPS定位信息

string.name: reason_location_approximate
string.value: 需要大致定位权限以辅助位置获取

string.name: reason_nearlink_access
string.value: 需要使用星闪（NearLink）以扫描并连接星闪设备

string.name: reason_internet
string.value: 需要访问网络以在用户手册中打开官网链接

string.name: permission_hide
string.value: Enable the system's anti-peep feature to protect the app's privacy.

string.name: reason_microphone
string.value: 需要使用麦克风以进行语音输入
